flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Colorado Mesa University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($22.3k → $25.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Colorado Mesa University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.0k → $9.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Colorado Mesa University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4% → 0.0%).
